title: Velvety Korean Beef Kidney Tteok
description: A creamy and fatty Korean dish featuring beef kidney in a pasta-water-emulsion, wrapped in a corn husk, suitable for vegan-friendly modification
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour and cornstarch
Gradually add in water to form a smooth dough
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes pliable
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces
Roll out each piece into a thin circle
In a separate pan, heat sesame oil and saute sliced beef kidney until browned
Add in soy sauce, garlic, and ginger, and stir fry for 2 minutes
Assemble the tteok by placing a spoonful of the beef kidney mixture onto a dough circle
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal
Wrap each tteok in a corn husk and steam for 15 minutes
